reason: The video at 00:00-00:01 shows lounge chairs on the Poolside patio, and a clear path leads through the Covered Patio (00:04-00:06) and into the Main Livingroom, where the white sectional sofa is visible at 00:30-00:31.

reason: The video at 00:05-00:06 shows the white wicker sofa on the Covered Patio. A navigable route is visible through the Dining space (00:16-00:20), Main Livingroom (00:30-00:34), up the white staircase (00:49-00:52), and into the Master bedroom where the large white bed is seen at 00:57-00:58.
